title: Trump Media pitches $100K-a-month Truth Social feed
summary: Scott Melker discusses Trump Media's proposal to charge institutional traders $100,000 a month for early access to Truth Social posts, warning that retail investors will likely get front-run and lose money trying to trade on the news. title: Ryanair CFO: Rival Airlines Could Fail This Winter; Industry Shakeout Could Lead to Pricing Power
summary: Ryanair's CFO just warned that several European airlines may not survive the coming winter, and he thinks that spells opportunity rather than crisis for his carrier. The reasoning behind that confidence reveals a cost structure gap so wide it barely seems like the same industry.

title: 3 Reasons I’m Buying Amazon Over and Over Until Late 2026
